case_title: KAIWEN YOU VS. YIPENG YI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETERS TO MAR-25-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KAIWEN YOU IS PRESENT MANDARIN INTERPRETER NEEDED. DEFENDANT YIPENG YI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUNFENG LUAN IS PRESENT, CANTONESE INTERPRETER NEEDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 25, 2019. PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH MANDARIN INTERPRETER REBECCA CHOW. DEFENDANTS PRESENT WITH CANTONESE INTERPRETER CARMEN LEE. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,994.91 FILED BY YOU, KAIWEN AS TO DEFENDANT YI, YIPENG LUAN, JUNFENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOU, KAIWEN
DECLARATION OF KAIWEN YOU RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOU, KAIWEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-31-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YI, YIPENG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-31-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUAN, JUNFENG
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-11-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-11-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-25-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR INTERPRETERS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOU, KAIWEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YI, YIPENG LUAN, JUNFENG $6,662.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,777.00, EACH OF THE DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $3,331.00 (TOTAL OF $6,662.00 PLUS HLAF OF THE COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
